title: API Gateway with Circuit Breaker
scenario: Design an API gateway with a circuit breaker pattern for handling network failures. The gateway should proxy requests to multiple backend services and implement a retry mechanism with exponential backoff. The target LLM output should be a Python code snippet implementing the API gateway.
constraints: Must use a Python library (e.g., requests, aiohttp) for making HTTP requests
Must implement a circuit breaker pattern for handling network failures

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should implement a circuit breaker pattern for handling network failures.
The API gateway should implement a retry mechanism with exponential backoff.
The gateway should proxy requests to multiple backend services.
